engineIntelligence.h2: Seat Exeo Engines- Codes, Common Failures& Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Seat Exeo in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data. Every engine is sourced from vetted specialists with warranty coverage.

cards.imagePlaceholder: [Engine image: Seat Exeo CAGA- clean isolated engine shot, neutral background]
cards.altText: Seat Exeo CAGA engine- diesel 2.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: EGR cooler leak- leads to coolant loss and white smoke from exhaust.
DPF blockage- frequent short journeys prevent regeneration, causing expensive filter needs.
Injector seal wear- can cause difficult starting and carbon buildup.

cards.imagePlaceholder: [Engine image: Seat Exeo BWE- clean isolated engine shot, neutral background]
cards.altText: Seat Exeo BWE engine- petrol 2.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Cam follower wear- catastrophic failure if not checked, damaging the high-pressure fuel pump.
Timing belt tensioner failure- critical maintenance item often overlooked until failure.
PCV valve failure- causes oil leaks and rough running.

cards.imagePlaceholder: [Engine image: Seat Exeo CDAA- clean isolated engine shot, neutral background]
cards.altText: Seat Exeo CDAA engine- petrol 1.8L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure- notorious weak point in early EA888 engines, risking catastrophic interference.
Carbon buildup on intake valves- direct injection design leads to heavy carbon deposits.
Piston ring sticking- can cause excessive oil consumption in some units.

commonProblems.h2: Seat Exeo Engine Problems- What It Costs to Fix& When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Seat Exeo’s reliability is largely defined by its Audi-sourced 2.0 TDI and 2.0 TFSI/1.8 TSI engines. While offering premium performance, these units share known vulnerabilities with the wider VAG group, particularly regarding cam followers(petrol), EGR coolers(diesel), and timing components. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point- plus a minimum 12‐month unlimited mileage warranty. Below we break down the most common failures, their repair costs, and when replacement is the smarter financial decision.

problems.group: Seat Exeo Cam Follower Failure- Why 2.0 TFSI Engines Fail
problems.h4: Seat Exeo Cam Follower Failure- Why 2.0 TFSI Engines Fail
problems.rootCause: The cam follower that sits between the camshaft and the high-pressure fuel pump wears through, causing metal-on-metal contact and eventual HPFP failure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace cam follower and inspect HPFP cam.
repairOptions.longevity: Essential check every 20k miles for BWE engines.
Viable if caught before engine contamination.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of rebuilt engine due to debris damage.
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary if metal shavings have entered the engine.

problems.recommendation: If you own a BWE engine, check the cam follower immediately. If the HPFP has failed and sent debris into the engine, a rebuilt unit is the only safe option.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2.0 TFSI engine prices for your Seat Exeo

problems.group: Seat Exeo EGR Cooler Leak- Loss of Coolant& White Smoke
problems.h4: Seat Exeo EGR Cooler Leak- Loss of Coolant& White Smoke
problems.rootCause: The EGR cooler develops internal cracks or seal failures, allowing exhaust gas to mix with coolant, leading to overheating and white smoke.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Blank off EGR system to prevent leaks.
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may cause MOT issues if not coded properly.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace EGR cooler and flush cooling system.
Rebuilt engine with upgraded EGR components.
repairOptions.longevity: Best for high-mileage cars with multiple system failures.

problems.recommendation: For a single leak, replace the cooler. However, if your Exeo also has DPF issues, a rebuilt engine with a cleaned or blanked EGR system offers better long-term reliability.
problems.cta: Get quotes for EGR-fix Seat Exeo engine replacement

problems.group: Seat Exeo DPF Blockage- Regeneration Failure& Costly Cleanup
problems.h4: Seat Exeo DPF Blockage- Regeneration Failure& Costly Cleanup
problems.affectedModels: Seat Exeo 2.0 TDI(CAGA, CAHA, CMEA) Euro 5
problems.rootCause: Frequent short trips prevent the Diesel Particulate Filter from reaching temperatures needed for passive regeneration, leading to ash accumulation and blockage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic tool forces active burn-off cycle.
repairOptions.longevity: Only works if blockage is minor and sensor-free.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit new or refurbished DPF unit.
repairOptions.longevity: Restores compliance but doesn't fix underlying driving habits.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt engine with cleaned DPF or Euro 6 upgrade.
repairOptions.longevity: Ideal if DPF failure coincides with turbo or injector issues.

problems.recommendation: If your DPF is blocked but the engine is otherwise healthy, a professional clean or replacement is viable. If you’re facing multiple emissions-related faults, a rebuilt engine ensures all components are fresh and compliant.
problems.cta: Compare DPF-compliant Seat Exeo engine prices

problems.group: Seat Exeo Timing Chain/Belt Failure- Catastrophic Engine Damage
problems.h4: Seat Exeo Timing Chain/Belt Failure- Catastrophic Engine Damage
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioners in EA888 engines can fail, causing the chain to jump teeth. BWE engines use belts which can snap if neglected.

repairOptions.longevity: Essential maintenance to prevent interference damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Strip head, replace valves, and resurface.
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged and mileage is low.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of rebuilt engine.
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage cars with snapped components.

problems.recommendation: If your timing component has failed, a rebuilt engine is almost always more cost-effective than a head repair, especially on older Exeos. Preventative changes are cheap insurance.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt engine prices for your Seat Exeo

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Seat Exeo
finalCta.paragraph: Whether it’s a worn cam follower, a leaking EGR cooler, or a blocked DPF, engine problems in the Seat Exeo can escalate quickly. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Seat Exeo specialists who provide rebuilt engines with upgraded components and nationwide delivery. Avoid the dealership premium and get back on the road with confidence, backed by a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Seat Exeo Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Seat Exeo and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‐month unlimited mileage warranty- always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineTypes.h2: Seat Exeo Engine Types- Options, Costs& What to Expect
engineTypes.intro: Every engine type is available through our UK network with typical price ranges based on your Seat Exeo’s variant, engine code and budget.

types.title: Seat Exeo Reconditioned Engines(Recon)
types.description: Professionally stripped, cleaned and tested engines with replaced worn parts. Ideal balance of quality and value for high-mileage Exeos.
types.frontDescription: Professionally stripped, cleaned and tested engines with replaced worn parts. Ideal balance of quality and value for high-mileage Exeos.
types.frontDisclaimer: Dyno-tested and validated. 12-month warranty included as standard.
types.backDescription: Reconditioned engines undergo a thorough inspection process where only damaged components are replaced. This makes them a cost-effective choice for Seat Exeo owners who want reliability without the premium price of a fully rebuilt unit.
backBullets: Ideal for engines with minor wear or single-component failure.
Includes compression test and leak-down validation.
Faster turnaround than full rebuilds due to partial disassembly.
types.cta: Compare reconditioned Seat Exeo engine prices

types.title: Seat Exeo Rebuilt Engines
types.description: Complete teardown with all wear items replaced to factory tolerances. The gold standard for longevity and performance restoration.
types.frontDescription: Complete teardown with all wear items replaced to factory tolerances. The gold standard for longevity and performance restoration.
types.frontDisclaimer: New pistons, bearings, seals and gaskets. 12-24 month warranty.
types.backDescription: A rebuilt engine is essentially a new engine inside your old block. Every component is measured and machined to spec, ensuring your Seat Exeo runs like new for years to come. Best for high-mileage or performance variants.
backBullets: All internal wear items replaced with new OEM-spec parts.
Cylinder heads pressure-tested and resurfaced if needed.
Best option for avoiding future repairs on aging engines.
types.cta: Get rebuilt Seat Exeo engine quotes

types.title: Seat Exeo Used Engines
types.description: Low-mileage second-hand units sourced from breaker networks. The most affordable option but with variable history and limited warranty.
types.frontDescription: Low-mileage second-hand units sourced from breaker networks. The most affordable option but with variable history and limited warranty.
types.frontDisclaimer: Mileage verified where possible. 3-6 month warranty typical.
types.backDescription: Used engines are pulled from written-off or scrapped vehicles. While cheap, they carry unknown wear levels. Suitable for budget-conscious repairs on older Exeos where long-term ownership isn't planned.
backBullets: Lowest upfront cost for immediate mobility.
Risk of hidden wear or impending failures remains.
Warranty periods are shorter than recon or rebuilt units.
types.cta: Check used Seat Exeo engine availability

types.title: Seat Exeo Remanufactured Engines
types.description: Factory-spec rebuilds performed by OEM-aligned facilities. Highest quality assurance with certified processes and extended coverage.
types.frontDescription: Factory-spec rebuilds performed by OEM-aligned facilities. Highest quality assurance with certified processes and extended coverage.
types.frontDisclaimer: OEM-certified process. Extended warranty options available.
types.backDescription: Remanufacturing follows strict factory guidelines, often exceeding original build quality. These engines are ideal for late-model Exeos under warranty or lease return requirements where provenance matters.
backBullets: Built to original manufacturer specifications and tolerances.
Often includes updated engineering fixes for known flaws.
Highest level of documentation and traceability.
types.cta: Compare remanufactured Seat Exeo engine costs

types.title: Seat Exeo Refurbished Engines
types.description: Cleaned and repaired units addressing specific known faults. A middle ground between used and reconditioned for targeted repairs.
types.frontDescription: Cleaned and repaired units addressing specific known faults. A middle ground between used and reconditioned for targeted repairs.
types.frontDisclaimer: Specific faults addressed only. 6-12 month warranty.
types.backDescription: Refurbished engines focus on fixing common failure points like timing chains or EGR valves without a full strip-down. Good for Exeos with a known single issue but otherwise healthy internals.
backBullets: Targets specific known weaknesses in VAG Group engines.
Cheaper than full recon but more reliable than raw used.
Quick turnaround for common fault-based repairs.
types.cta: View refurbished Seat Exeo engine options

types.title: Seat Exeo Supply& Fit Engines
types.description: Complete service including engine delivery, installation, fluids and coding at a local garage. Hassle-free solution for non-mechanics.
types.frontDescription: Complete service including engine delivery, installation, fluids and coding at a local garage. Hassle-free solution for non-mechanics.
types.frontDisclaimer: Labour varies by location. Quote includes VAT and disposal.
types.backDescription: Supply and fit removes the logistical headache of finding a garage. Our partner garages handle everything from removal to final coding, ensuring your Seat Exeo is road-ready with a single invoice.
backBullets: Includes all labour, fluids, filters and ancillary belts.
Single point of contact for warranty claims.
Ideal for owners without access to specialist tools.
types.cta: Find Seat Exeo engine supply& fit deals

engineYears.h2: Seat Exeo Engines by Year- What Was Fitted& When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Seat Exeo's production run, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The first-generation Exeo launched with Audi-sourced 2.0 TFSI and 2.0 TDI engines, establishing the model’s reputation for premium feel and performance.
keyChanges: Introduction of 2.0 TDI(CAGA/CAHA) common rail diesels.
Shared platform with Audi A4 B7.
knownFor: Cam follower wear in BWE petrol engines.
EGR cooler leaks in CAGA diesel engines.

years.description: The facelifted Exeo introduced the 1.8 TSI engine and updated 2.0 TDI variants, improving refinement and emissions compliance.
knownFor: Timing chain tensioner issues in 1.8 TSI engines.
Improved fuel economy and lower tax bands.

faq.h2: Seat Exeo Engine Replacement- Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Seat Exeo engine replacement cost in the UK?
keyPoints: Used engines start around £950-£1,600 for 2.0 TDI/TSI.
Reconditioned units average £1,200-£2,200 with warranty.
Rebuilt engines cost £1,600-£2,800 for full reliability.
Labour for supply and fit is typically £600-£900 extra.
items.cta: Compare live Seat Exeo engine prices now

items.question: Will an Audi A4 engine fit my Seat Exeo?
keyPoints: Platform sharing means high compatibility.
Verify engine code(e.g., CAGA vs CAGA) before purchase.
ECU coding may be required for seamless integration.
Professional installation is strongly recommended.
items.cta: Speak to a Seat Exeo engine specialist

items.question: What is the most common engine code for Seat Exeo in the UK?
keyPoints: CAGA powers the majority of diesel Exeos.
BWE is the standard petrol engine for early models.
CDAA 1.8 TSI became common in later years.
Always check your VIN to confirm the exact code.
items.cta: Verify your Seat Exeo engine code instantly

items.question: Do Seat Exeo replacement engines come with a warranty?
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines typically include 12-24 month warranties.
Reconditioned units usually have 12 months cover.
Used engines may only have 3-6 months warranty.
Always confirm if labour is included in the warranty.

items.question: How long does Seat Exeo engine replacement take?
keyPoints: Stock engines can be dispatched within 24 hours.
Non-stock units may take 3-5 days to source.
Installation takes 1-2 days at a specialist garage.
Coding and testing add half a day to the process.
items.cta: Book fast-fit Seat Exeo engine service

items.question: Is a reconditioned Seat Exeo engine reliable?
keyPoints: Only damaged parts are replaced in recon units.
Compression and leak-down tests ensure health.
Less expensive than full rebuilds but very reliable.
Ideal for mid-mileage Exeos needing a fix.

items.question: Should I repair or replace my Seat Exeo engine?
keyPoints: Major repairs(cam follower, turbo) cost £1,000+.
Rebuilt engines offer like-new reliability for £1,600+.
High-mileage engines risk further failures after repair.
Replacement includes warranty, repairs often do not.
items.cta: Get a repair vs replace quote

items.question: Can I get finance for a Seat Exeo engine replacement?
keyPoints: Finance is often available for supply and fit bundles.
Credit checks may apply for larger amounts.
Spread costs over 3-12 months with some providers.
Ask your garage about payment plan options.
items.cta: Enquire about finance for your engine

items.question: Do you supply Seat Exeo engines nationwide in the UK?
keyPoints: Nationwide delivery via courier or specialist transport.
Network of partner garages in most major cities.
Collection options available from some breakers.
Delivery times vary from 24 hours to 5 days.

items.question: How do I find my Seat Exeo engine code?
keyPoints: Check the service book for a white sticker.
Look for a code like CAGA on the engine block.
VIN decoder tools can identify the code online.
Enter your reg above for instant verification.
